case_title: PROFESSIONAL COLLECTION CONSULTANTS VS. KUSUMA WIDJAJA et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: ACCRUED INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROFESSIONAL COLLECTION CONSULTANTS

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROFESSIONAL COLLECTION CONSULTANTS AS TO DEFENDANT WIDJAJA, KUSUMA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-22-2010

DECLARATION REDUCTION IN FILING FEES PER (B/P) CODE SECTION 6322.1(C)(1) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROFESSIONAL COLLECTION CONSULTANTS

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $228.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT WIDJAJA, KUSUMA
DECLARATION UNDER CCP 1033 B RE: LETTER ADVISING OF SUPERIOR COURT FILING ORDER AUTHORIZING COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROFESSIONAL COLLECTION CONSULTANTS

ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF PROFESSIONAL COLLECTION CONSULTANTS
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROFESSIONAL COLLECTION CONSULTANTS SERVED JUL-14-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WIDJAJA, KUSUMA
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PROFESSIONAL COLLECTION CONSULTANTS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WIDJAJA, KUSUMA $8,277.62 PRINCIPAL, $800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $2,148.61 INTEREST, $228.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,454.73, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
